assertions.title: Open in Apple Music Button Disabled State

steps.action: Blocked network requests to simulate no-album-loaded state
steps.expected: API calls fail, album does not load
steps.observed: Network route aborted, page shows skeleton/placeholder state

steps.action: Captured screenshot of initial disabled state
steps.observed: Button wrapper is disabled, link inside is non-interactive due to parent disabled state
Button has disabled=true, link wrapped in disabled button. Button's disabled classes apply opacity-60 and pointer-events-none

evidence.network: API requests aborted to simulate initial state

steps.action: Blocked network requests to simulate no-album-loaded state
Checked computed styles on Reroll button

steps.observed: Button is marked disabled in snapshot and computed styles show pointer-events: none

steps.expected: Each button/link receives visible focus ring
steps.observed: All buttons receive focus-visible styles on Tab navigation
boxShadow shows: 'rgba(255,255,255) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgb(48,39,33) 0px 0px 0px 4px' - visible ring and offset

steps.action: Verified Apple Music link focus ring
steps.expected: Visible focus ring on link when focused
steps.observed: Link shows focus-visible ring with box-shadow when tabbed to
Button receives focus and shows visible ring (matching CSS classes: focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2)

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all passed. VAL-MICRO-007 and VAL-MICRO-008 verified disabled state styling (opacity-60, pointer-events-none) correctly applied. VAL-MICRO-009 verified visible focus rings on all interactive buttons via keyboard Tab navigation.
